title: Builders optimization
description: A optimization modpack, with some QoL features and texture packs
body:
### This modpack was created for fellow builders with low-end pc's that have to little fps to build functionaly, like me.
It pairs greatly with **Axiom** if you would want to build some bigger builds.
> _(note that Axiom is server-side and this modpack is purely client-side)_

And if you dont have the ability to build something by yourself but the tutorials are too hard, or there are none, you can always use **Litematica**.

Builders Optimization also has some **Quality of Life** features such as 
thanks to **uku's Armor HUD by uku** you can see your armor in your hotbar and not only in your inventory.

This modpack also offers some optional graphical changes to your game like shaders thanks to the mod **Iris Shaders by coderbot**,
there's also some texture packs such as **Bare Bones by RobotPants** and **Fresh Animations by FreshLX** or you could pair up both of them thanks to the texture **Bare Bones x Fresh Animations by Team Hibiscus**.
